codeReview.summary: This commit intentionally stays verification-only: it adds missing regression coverage around the already-landed digest-backed refresh-token and password-reset implementation rather than changing production auth code or schema. The new tests cover digest-only lookup, legacy-row backfill, and continued legacy-token consumption through the compatibility window, while the handoff separately confirms no `db/migration_v2` or legacy `db/migration` files changed in this packet, so the feature strengthens proof for VAL-AUTH-003 without introducing new runtime risk.

summary: PASS. The digest-storage rollout remains narrow and v2-only, and this packet closes the evidence gap with focused compatibility tests instead of widening implementation scope.
